name: harness
description: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and emits runtime-specific skills, rules, or AGENTS.md instructions using six team-architecture patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation). Claude Code, Cursor, Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리.
